summary: Completed comprehensive testing of YouTube AI Wrapper application. Backend APIs successfully fixed and working with 87.5% success rate. Frontend fully functional with excellent UI/UX, video analysis, chat functionality, and search features working as expected.

resolved_issues.fix: Updated from YouTubeTranscriptApi.get_transcript() to using instance api.fetch() method
resolved_issues.impact: Video transcript fetching now working correctly

resolved_issues.fix: Implemented fallback search mechanism to handle library compatibility issues
resolved_issues.impact: Video search functionality restored with fallback mechanism

minor_issues.issue: Empty search query returns 200 instead of 400/422

design_feedback.observation: Excellent ocean blue/cyan glassmorphism theme implementation
design_feedback.details: Modern UI with proper contrast, smooth animations, responsive layout

design_feedback.observation: AI responses working perfectly with proper loading states
design_feedback.details: Real-time chat with video context, good UX for AI processing delays

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and CTA buttons
Navigation from landing page to dashboard (/app route)
YouTube URL input and analyze functionality
Video player displays correctly after analysis
Key points extraction and display in tabs
Chat panel Q&A functionality with video context
MongoDB storage for videos and chat sessions
